checks.text: Colors map to M3 system color roles (primary, surface, on-surface, etc.), no raw hex outside the token set.
Spacing aligns to the 8dp grid (4dp allowed for fine adjustments).
Corner rounding uses M3 shape scale (small 8 / medium 12 / large 16).
Elevation expressed via M3 tonal/surface tints, not arbitrary drop shadows.
Interactive components show M3 state layers (hover/focus/pressed).
On-color roles meet WCAG AA against their container.
